Pinning Strategy\n\n### Strictly Pinned (Reproducible)\n\n| Component | Pin Location | Strategy |\n|-----------|--------------|----------|\n| **Go version** | go.mod, Dockerfile, .golangci.yml | verification\ngo test -v ./...\n```\n\n### Pluck (NEEDLE) Environment\n\n```bash\n# Check Rust version (minimum 1.75)\nrustc --version\n\n# Verify Pluck installation\nneedle --version\n\n# Check Pluck
